arts.ttl: Exclusive: £16.6m star now decides to snub Manchester City, Tottenham and Liverpool in favour of new contract
Tottenham sold a player for £8m this summer who's been scoring more frequently than Heung-min Son this season
Tottenham star Cristian Romero sends six-word message after Ange Postecoglou injury update
arts.sum: Of the group dealing with injuries, Romero looked to be the closest towards a return with Postecoglou later issuing a thorough update on his recovery. Tottenham defender Cristian Romero has posted a heartfelt message on social media following Ange Postecoglou's injury update before his side face Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou drops major hint over club's January transfer plans
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says that his club need to strengthen their attacking department during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'Rarely seen anything like it': Tottenham released 'incredible' star in the summer, he's making big impact at new club
arts.sum: Tottenham maybe should have kept him...

Ange Postecoglou spoke to the media at Hotspur Way today ahead of our Premier League clash against Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium on Thursday evening (8.15pm). Ange: "Yeah, a tough challenge and not just of late, but last year, new manager coming in and they're really aggressive with their football.

arts.ttl: Report: Man United considering move for 'incredible' Tottenham player following Ruben Amorim's arrival
arts.sum: What a statement this would be! 🤩

arts.ttl: Bournemouth could be without three players for Tottenham as Andoni Iraola provides injury update
arts.sum: Cook missed Saturday’s 4-2 win at Wolves due to a muscle strain having started in all 12 of the Cherries’ previous league games this season and Iraola does not want to rush the former Leeds midfielder back. They have beaten both Arsenal and Manchester City at the Vitality Stadium this season, but Iraola is a big admirer of Tottenham – they took six points off the Cherries last season – and expecting another big challenge.

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars nominated for Fans' Footballer of the Year 2024 award
arts.sum: Kulusevski got five assists and two goals but he’s been involved in so much more in the build-up to Spurs goals aplenty. He managed four goals and six assists in the League in the second half of last season, making it 18 goal involvements in 2024.

arts.ttl: 'I see the potential': Postecoglou suggests he's a big fan of £60m Spurs player who's barely played this term
